title: Bitter Chewy Mediterranean Date Pudding
description: This mediterranean date pudding combines the rich flavors of bitter dates with a touch of chewiness from vegetable shortening and a hint of fermentation for a unique date-night dessert.

ingredients.name: 2 cups soaked and pitted dates
ingredients.notes: Soak in hot water for at least an hour

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup melted vegetable shortening
ingredients.notes: Can be any type of neutral-flavored vegetable oil or fat

instructions: Combine soaked dates with shortening, vinegar, and garlic in a medium saucepan. Stir until smooth.
Add almond milk to the pan, along with cinnamon and salt. Bring mixture to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce heat to low and let simmer for about 5 minutes or until mixture thickens slightly.
Transfer pudding into serving dishes. Chill before serving.
